hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('path','') or d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); blocked=['bibliography.bib','settings.json','data/raw/restricted']; sys.exit(2 if any(b in p for b in blocked) and 'deprecated' not in p else 0)"

python3 -c "import datetime,os; f=f'session-logs/context-snapshot-{datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d_%H%M")}.md'; os.makedirs('session-logs',exist_ok=True); open(f,'w').write('# Context Snapshot (Pre-Compaction)

Saved automatically before context compression.
Claude should read this file to restore state.
'); print(f'Context snapshot saved to {f}')"
python3 -c "import glob; snaps=sorted(glob.glob('session-logs/context-snapshot-*.md')); print(f'Latest context snapshot: {snaps[-1]}' if snaps else 'No context snapshots found')"
